user.title: Grid Coordinator Setup
user.description: Configure controller parameters. Enable **Testing mode** to create simulated entities automatically — useful in a devcontainer where real devices are unavailable.

data.mpc_sign_inverted: Invert mpc_grid_power sign (enable if positive = export)
data.mpc_batt_sign_inverted: Invert mpc_battery_power sign (enable if positive = charge)
data.monitored_load_1_headroom: Monitored load 1 — import headroom to reserve (W)
data.monitored_load_1_holdoff_minutes: Monitored load 1 — headroom holdoff after power drops (min)

data_description.test_mode: Creates simulated number/select/switch entities and wires them up automatically. Enable the 'Sim Enabled' switch in HA to start the control loop.
data_description.import_limit: Maximum safe grid import. 12000 W is a safe limit for a 15 kW single-phase connection.
data_description.export_limit: Maximum permitted grid export. 10000 W is a typical network rule for solar installations.
data_description.ramp_step: Maximum change in battery command per tick. Smaller = smoother; larger = faster response.
data_description.plan_stale_minutes: If the EMHASS plan has not been updated in this many minutes, the coordinator falls back to a zero grid-exchange target.
data_description.mpc_sign_inverted: Enable if your EMHASS mpc_grid_power uses injection convention (positive = export). Default off: positive = import.
data_description.mpc_batt_sign_inverted: Enable if your EMHASS mpc_battery_power uses load convention (positive = charge). Default off: positive = discharge.
data_description.self_consumption_mode: Exact work mode name for self-consumption on your inverter. 'Self-consumption' for Voltx Modbus; 'Self-consumption mode' for Solplanet.
data_description.self_consumption_deadband: When |grid_target| is within this band of zero, the coordinator hands off to the inverter's native self-consumption mode. Default ±50 W.
data_description.tracking_deadband: If the grid error (actual minus target) is within this band, the battery command is held unchanged. Prevents command chatter from measurement noise and small load fluctuations. Default 200 W.
data_description.ev_charger_threshold: When the EV charger sensor exceeds this power, the battery SOC floor is raised to the current SOC + 1 % so the battery cannot discharge to compensate. Grid import absorbs the EV load naturally up to the import limit. Default 500 W.
data_description.monitored_load_1_threshold: When this load sensor exceeds the threshold, headroom is reserved on the grid import. Default 10 W.
data_description.monitored_load_1_headroom: Import headroom (W) to keep available when the monitored load is active. Battery charging is reduced to maintain this margin. Default 6000 W.
data_description.monitored_load_1_holdoff_minutes: How long the load must read below its threshold before headroom is released. Prevents rapid cycling for spikey loads. Default 5 min.

entities.title: Entity Configuration
entities.description: Enter the Home Assistant entity IDs for each signal. These must match the entity IDs exactly as shown in Developer Tools → States.

data_description.entity_grid_power: Positive = importing from grid. E.g. sensor.iammeter_power_a
data_description.entity_mpc_grid_power: EMHASS output — sign handled by the 'invert sign' option above.
data_description.entity_mpc_batt_power: Primary control variable. Positive = discharging (battery → AC). E.g. sensor.mpc_battery_power
data_description.entity_voltx_max_charge: Maximum power the inverter will draw from the grid to charge.
data_description.entity_voltx_max_discharge: Maximum power the inverter will push to the house/grid.
data_description.entity_soc_min: Below this SOC the controller will not charge the battery.
data_description.entity_soc_max: Above this SOC the controller will not discharge the battery.
data_description.entity_enabled: When off, the coordinator is dormant and leaves the inverter untouched.
data_description.entity_voltx_cmd: Positive = discharge (battery → AC). Written each tick.
data_description.entity_ev_charger: Power sensor for the EV charger circuit. Leave blank to disable EV charge awareness.
data_description.entity_monitored_load_1: Power sensor for a large transient load (e.g. oven). Leave blank to disable headroom reservation.

solax.title: Solax Battery (Priority 2)
solax.description: Entity IDs for the Solax inverter remote-control interface (via homeassistant-solax-modbus). Leave **Solax SOC sensor** blank to disable Solax coordination entirely.

data.entity_solax_rc_active_power: Remote control active power setpoint (number entity)

data_description.entity_solax_soc: E.g. sensor.solax_battery_capacity. Leave blank to disable Solax coordination.
data_description.entity_solax_soc_min: Solax will not discharge below this SOC. E.g. number.solax_selfuse_discharge_min_soc
data_description.entity_solax_soc_max: Solax will not charge above this SOC. E.g. number.solax_battery_charge_upper_soc
data_description.entity_solax_rc_power_control: Select entity with 'Disabled' / 'Enabled Power Control' options. E.g. select.solax_remotecontrol_power_control
data_description.entity_solax_rc_active_power: Signed power setpoint in W. Solax convention: negative = discharge. E.g. number.solax_remotecontrol_active_power
data_description.entity_solax_rc_autorepeat_duration: Seconds the command stays active before the inverter reverts. E.g. number.solax_remotecontrol_autorepeat_duration
data_description.entity_solax_rc_trigger: Button that activates the remote-control command. E.g. button.solax_remotecontrol_trigger_gen3

init.title: Controller Parameters
init.description: Adjust controller settings. Changing **Testing mode** will reload the integration and create or remove simulated entities.

data.mpc_sign_inverted: Invert mpc_grid_power sign (enable if positive = export)
data.mpc_batt_sign_inverted: Invert mpc_battery_power sign (enable if positive = charge)
data.monitored_load_1_headroom: Monitored load 1 — import headroom to reserve (W)
data.monitored_load_1_holdoff_minutes: Monitored load 1 — headroom holdoff after power drops (min)

data_description.test_mode: When enabled, simulated entities are created for all signals. Disabling removes them on next reload.
data_description.ramp_step: Maximum change in battery command per tick.
data_description.plan_stale_minutes: Minutes before the EMHASS plan is considered stale.
data_description.mpc_sign_inverted: Enable if mpc_grid_power uses injection convention (positive = export). Default off.
data_description.mpc_batt_sign_inverted: Enable if mpc_battery_power uses load convention (positive = charge). Default off.
data_description.tracking_deadband: Hold the battery command when the grid error is within this band. Reduces Modbus writes and prevents oscillation from measurement noise.
data_description.ev_charger_threshold: Battery discharge suppressed when EV charger exceeds this power.
data_description.monitored_load_1_threshold: Headroom reserved when monitored load exceeds this power.
data_description.monitored_load_1_headroom: Import headroom (W) kept available when load is active.
data_description.monitored_load_1_holdoff_minutes: Minutes load must be off before headroom is released.
data_description.solax_max_charge: Physical charge power limit of the Solax inverter. Default 2400 W for X1 AC G3.
data_description.solax_max_discharge: Physical discharge power limit of the Solax inverter. Default 2400 W for X1 AC G3.

entities.title: Entity Configuration
entities.description: Override entity IDs for any signal. In testing mode, fields default to the simulated entity IDs — change individual ones to mix real and simulated entities.

data_description.entity_soc_min: Below this SOC the controller will not charge.
data_description.entity_soc_max: Above this SOC the controller will not discharge.
data_description.entity_enabled: When off, the coordinator is dormant.
data_description.entity_voltx_cmd: Positive = discharge (battery → AC). Written each tick.
data_description.entity_ev_charger: Leave blank to disable EV charge awareness.
data_description.entity_monitored_load_1: Leave blank to disable headroom reservation.

solax.title: Solax Battery (Priority 2)
solax.description: Entity IDs for the Solax remote-control interface. Leave **Solax SOC sensor** blank to disable Solax coordination.

data.entity_solax_rc_active_power: Remote control active power setpoint (number entity)

data_description.entity_solax_soc: E.g. sensor.solax_battery_capacity. Leave blank to disable Solax coordination.
data_description.entity_solax_soc_min: Solax will not discharge below this SOC.
data_description.entity_solax_soc_max: Solax will not charge above this SOC.
data_description.entity_solax_rc_active_power: Signed power setpoint (negative = discharge in Solax convention).
data_description.entity_solax_rc_autorepeat_duration: Seconds the command stays active before the inverter reverts.
data_description.entity_solax_rc_trigger: Button that activates the remote-control command.
